name_en: Premium top-grain leather M23951 Light green with white Medium. This Capucines Medium handbag features a beautiful Lovelock braided chain. It connects hand-painted Monogram elements and the LV monogram lock with chain links. Contrasting leather forms the iconic LV logo, exuding an elegant air. Dimensions: 31.5 × 20 × 11 cm
